Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}What's going on? Did we make it out somehow?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I dunno... Something seems off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}What're you doing out here on a weekday? Shouldn't you be in school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Spring break? That was a couple months ago. It's July now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}And what's with the getup? You all headed somewhere, or...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}...Well, I'll let it slide since you kids are a little different.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Don't think I'll always turn a blind eye, though. If you're up to something, you won't get off scot-free. Are we clear?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}All the dates displayed here say 2009... That calendar, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}So when he said it's July, did he mean... July of last year?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}That's impossible... Are you saying this is the past?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Are the things here that interesting to you...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It's all normal, everyday stuff, right? This is a "fountain," and that over there is a "store"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Well, I come here to gaze at the fountain myself from time to time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}But there is something mysterious about this place—for all of us, not just you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}...We got here by passing through a door, remember?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Doors like that are located throughout the Abyss of Time, each of them connected to the past.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Then... This really is last year!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}How else can you explain the different time and season?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}But it seems you can't just go anywhere in the past... Only somewhere from your memories.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I don't think this place connects to anywhere else, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}We're lucky to have ended up here. Let's use this time to gather supplies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Whatever we get here should be usable until the Abyss of Time disappears.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Perhaps that's why the door led us here in the first place...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}It may have reflected your inner thoughts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}She seems to be taking this pretty well... It's all so mind-boggling to me, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Well, on the bright side... At least we won't starve now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}...And that was how we learned why[n]the Abyss of Time was called as such.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}It was a place where one[n]could revisit bygone days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}But looking back on it now, that wasn't[n]the only thing that astounded us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Maybe we all subconsciously[n]sensed some sort of salvation...[n]{f 1 1}
